name: predicted-vs-oracle-10seed
description: 10 seeds, baseline 7^3 goal-vector. End-to-end test of the goal-vector CNN: replace the env's oracle direction signal with the trained network's prediction. PPO with the same curriculum as curriculum-5seed; 2 landmarks, 10 seeds, 300 eps. Pair this with the curriculum-5seed run (oracle direction) for the comparison baseline. Tightens 95% CIs vs. the 3-seed predicted-vs-oracle run.
